name: Refugee
overview: When a drug dealer from the Geneva Camp of Bangladesh gets involved in a spine-chilling conspiracy of the third generation of freedom fighters, it makes him keep his displeasure with his own country aside and fight to prevent a catastrophe!

trailers.title: Trailer- Refugee(রিফিউজি) |Afzal, Zakia Bari Mamo, Shohel, Sharif |Imtiaz Hossain |10th Jun |hoichoi
